paywall_testimonial_1_text: The best workout tracking app I've ever used. The support from the developers is incredible. It's nothing like the other faulty apps I've used! Can I give 6 stars?
paywall_testimonial_2_text: With this app, I can easily record all my workouts and track my progress. I definitely recommend it!
paywall_faq_a1: Unlimited workout logs, custom exercises, AI coach, and advanced analytics are included.
paywall_faq_q2: Is LogPress Pro a one-time payment or does it renew?
paywall_faq_a2: The subscription automatically renews. You can cancel at any time in the settings.
paywall_faq_q3: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
paywall_faq_a3: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through the App Store settings.
paywall_faq_q4: Can I change my subscription plan?
paywall_faq_a4: Yes, you can switch to a different plan at any time through the App Store.
paywall_faq_a5: Refund requests are evaluated according to Apple policies. You can apply through the App Store.

points_workout_completion_description: You earn points based on your performance after each workout. The weight you lift, the sets and reps you do affect your score.
points_regular_workout_description: The more regular you workout, the more your points multiply.
points_muscle_development_description: You earn separate points for each muscle group. Primary muscle groups give more points.
points_exercise_variety_description: You earn extra performance points as you try different exercises.
points_level_progression_description: There are 6 different levels from Bronze to Champion. You earn new badges as you level up.
leaderboard_loading_error: The leaderboard could not be loaded.
leaderboard_profile_feature_1: • Special analyses and suggestions for each muscle group 💪
no_daily_tasks: You currently have no daily tasks. Come back later 😊
badge_bronze_description: You've started your fitness journey and are developing a regular training habit. Each workout brings you one step closer to a stronger and healthier life!
badge_silver_description: You continue to improve yourself with regular training and dietary discipline. You're getting stronger every day on your way to the Silver badge!
badge_gold_description: You're adding variety to your workouts and taking on new challenges. The Gold badge represents your determination on the path to becoming a fitness enthusiast!
badge_platinum_description: You're making a difference with regular training and dietary discipline. The Platinum badge is a special symbol of achievement for those who make sports a lifestyle!
badge_diamond_description: You're sticking to your workout program and constantly improving yourself. The Diamond badge awaits those who reach the peak of their fitness journey!
badge_champion_description: You're striving for success at the highest level. The Champion badge is a special achievement reached by athletes who push their limits and never give up!
badge_locked_description: You need to reach the next level to unlock this badge.
badges_rule_1: - You earn points for each workout you complete, points increase based on the difficulty and duration of the workout.
badges_rule_2: - You earn extra points when you create and follow your own workout program.
badges_rule_3: - You can increase your points by doing exercises targeting different muscle groups, you get bonus points as you make progress with the targeted muscle groups.
badges_rule_4: - You earn extra points when you complete your weekly or monthly workout goals.
badges_rule_5: - You are rewarded with extra points when you jump from one level (for example, from Bronze to Silver).

stats_overall_rating_intro: Honestly... we don't exactly know either 🥸 But according to legend, a wise trainer once said:

profile_fitness_level_description: How accustomed are you to organized training plans?
faq_a1: Logpress is a mobile app that allows users to track their workouts, monitor their progress, and earn points for every exercise they do.
faq_q2: 2. How can I start using the app?
faq_a2: To start using Logpress, simply download the app and create an account. Then, fill out your profile and start your workouts to track your progress.
faq_q3: 3. How can I track my workouts?
faq_a3: After logging into the app, you can add your workouts by going to the 'Add Workout' section. From there, you can select the exercises you've done and record the sets and repetitions you've performed.
faq_q4: 4. What types of workouts can I track?
faq_a4: Logpress includes a variety of workout movements suitable for all levels. There are many options such as weight training, cardio, stretching, and bodyweight exercises.
faq_a5: You earn points based on the type and intensity of the exercises you do each time you complete a workout. The more and effective workouts you do, the more points you earn.
faq_q6: 6. How can I see my points?
faq_a6: You can view your points from your profile page. The points you earn after each workout are automatically added to your account.
faq_q7: 7. How can I compete with other users?
faq_a7: Logpress offers leaderboards that allow users to compete with each other using points. You can compare your points with your friends or all users.
faq_q8: 8. On which devices can Logpress be used?
faq_a8: Logpress can be used on all current versions of iOS and Android devices.
faq_q9: 9. How are my data backed up to prevent loss of my workouts?
faq_a9: Your app data is backed up on cloud-based systems. After creating an account, all your workouts and progress are safely stored.
faq_a10: The basic features of Logpress are free. However, subscription options are offered for premium features and special workout plans.
faq_a11: With a premium membership, you get: Access to special workout programs, AI-supported progress tracking and scoring, unlimited weekly workout starts, the ability to add more exercises to workouts, more detailed workout analysis, and many more features.
faq_q12: 12. How do I reach my body development goals with Logpress?
faq_a12: Logpress allows you to track your body development goals step by step. By regularly doing your workouts and monitoring your progress, you can reach your goals faster.
faq_q13: 13. How can I decide which exercises to do?
faq_a13: The app suggests customized exercise plans based on users' goals. You can workout under the guidance of the app by setting your goals (muscle building, weight loss, etc.).
faq_q14: 14. Does Logpress offer me personal trainer suggestions?
faq_a14: Yes, the app offers suggested workout plans based on your personal goals. It also includes guides that provide information about workout techniques.
faq_q15: 15. Can I share my workouts with my friends?
faq_a15: Yes, you can share your workouts on your social media accounts or send them to your friends through the app.
faq_q16: 16. What are the points you give used for?
faq_a16: The points you earn help you measure your progress and achieve certain achievements within the app. These points also enable you to win rewards.
faq_q17: 17. I have lost data, what should I do?
faq_a17: If you have lost data, you can access the backed up data by updating your profile and logging back into your account. You can apply to the 'Help' section in the app to contact the support team.
faq_q18: 18. I have a superficial sports history, is this app suitable for me?
faq_a18: Yes, Logpress offers workouts suitable for all levels. You can start with easy exercises specifically designed for beginners.
faq_q19: 19. How do the achievements provided by Logpress work?
faq_a19: You earn achievements when you reach certain goals or do a certain amount of workouts. The app systematically tracks each achievement.
